thresholds.threshold_source: bd-d4m5k rich scorecard: primary gate is per_category_weighted.score

sections.title: INSERTThroughput — Single Transaction — tiny_1col
sections.description: Record: 1 col (INTEGER PK only). All rows inserted in a single BEGIN..COMMIT.

sections.title: INSERTThroughput — Single Transaction — small_3col
sections.description: Record: 3 cols (~30B: id, name, value). All rows inserted in a single BEGIN..COMMIT.

sections.title: INSERTThroughput — Single Transaction — medium_6col
sections.description: Record: 6 cols (~180B: id, name, email, bio, category, score). All rows inserted in a single BEGIN..COMMIT.

sections.title: INSERTThroughput — Single Transaction — large_10col
sections.description: Record: 10 cols (~600B: includes long text fields). All rows inserted in a single BEGIN..COMMIT.

sections.title: INSERTThroughput — Transaction Strategy Comparison (small_3col)
sections.description: Compares autocommit, batched (1K/txn), and single-txn strategies.

sections.title: INSERTThroughput — Record Size Comparison (10K rows, single txn)
sections.description: Fixed 10K rows in a single transaction, varying payload size.

rows.scenario: medium_6col — 6 cols (~180B: id, name, email, bio, category, score)
large_10col — 10 cols (~600B: includes long text fields)

sections.title: Concurrent Writers — C SQLite WAL vs FrankenSQLite MVCC
sections.description: Each writer inserts 1000 rows into non-overlapping key ranges on the same file-backed WAL database. Both engines spawn N OS threads each owning its own connection; C SQLite uses WAL + busy_timeout, FrankenSQLite uses the MVCC page-lock table via `PRAGMA fsqlite.concurrent_mode=ON` + `BEGIN CONCURRENT` (falling back to plain BEGIN if the pragma is declined). This mirrors the standalone `mt_mvcc_bench` harness.

sections.title: Concurrent Writers — C SQLite Single-Thread Baseline
sections.description: Same total row count as concurrent tests, but single-threaded file-backed C SQLite.

sections.title: Read-After-Write Query Performance
sections.description: Insert N rows, then benchmark various SELECT patterns. Record: small_3col.

sections.title: UPDATE/DELETE Throughput
sections.description: Pre-populated table with N rows. Measures batch update (10% of rows) and batch delete (5% of rows).

sections.title: Mixed OLTP Workload (80% read / 20% write)
sections.description: Pre-seeded with 5K rows. Runs 5K operations with realistic distribution: 40% point lookups, 20% range scans, 20% aggregates, 15% inserts, 3% updates, 2% deletes.

sections.title: JOIN Performance — Multi-Table Queries
sections.description: Two related tables (orders+customers). Measures INNER JOIN, LEFT JOIN, self-join, and JOIN with aggregation.

sections.title: Subquery & CTE Performance
sections.description: Measures scalar subqueries, EXISTS, IN subqueries, and recursive CTEs.

sections.title: String & Pattern Matching Performance
sections.description: LIKE patterns, string functions, and text-heavy queries.
